fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the receipt number.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program filled in this field automatically and uses it to keep track of the purchase lines.
You cannot change the number because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where the receipt line is registered.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the posting group that was used when this purchase receipt line was posted.
The program copies the code from the Posting Group field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the items were expected.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of additional receipts posted.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item on the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that was used on the receipt.
The program copies the VAT percentage from the VAT % field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the VAT percentage because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount percentage granted on items on each individual line.
The program copies the line discount percentage from the Line Discount % field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the line discount percentage because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the price, in LCY, for one unit of the item.
The program copies the unit price from the Unit Price (LCY) field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the unit price because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the receipt line could have been included in an invoice discount calculation.
The program copies the information from the Allow Invoice Disc. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Item Rcpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the item ledger entry associated with the purchase receipt line.
The program created the number when the line was posted. The number is not displayed anywhere else in the program.
You cannot change the number because the receipt has already been posted.
Item Tracking
If the purchase receipt line carries multiple unique item tracking numbers when posted, this will result in one item ledger entry for each item tracking number. For such one-to-many relations, the Item Entry Relation table manages the relation to the item ledger entries in stead of the Item Rcpt. Entry No. field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: Qty. Rcd. Not Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the returned item that has been posted as received but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.

fields.name: Sales Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the sales order that the drop shipment was based on when the purchase order was shipped directly from the vendor to a customer.
The program copies the number from the Sales Order No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the number because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Sales Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales order line number to use when a purchase order is shipped directly to a customer (drop shipment) in connection with a sales order.
The program copies the number from the Sales Order Line No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the number because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general business posting group that was used when this purchase receipt line was posted.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group code that is assigned to the items on this line.
The program automatically retrieves the code from the Item table or the G/L Account table.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when this line was posted.
The program copies the code from the VAT Calculation Type field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the purchase line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the transaction type because the receipt memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the purchase line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the transport method because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the extended text line number that is attached to the purchase line.
The program copies the extended text line number from the Attached to Line No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of entry where the items pass into your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Entry Point field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used for the items in this line.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction specification of the purchase line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction specification from the Transaction Specification field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the transaction specification because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the vendor.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that purchases from the vendor on the purchase header was liable to sales tax.
The program copies the code from the Tax Liable field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the tax group code of the item.
The program copies the code from the Tax Group Code field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the tax amount for the entry is use tax.
The code is copied from the Use Tax field on the purchase line.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the vendor.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase line.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT product posting group of the item.
The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total net amount (amount excluding VAT) that the purchase receipt line consists of. The program copied the amount from the VAT Base Amount field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the purchase document was posted.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job Line Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of job line that the purchase receipt fulfills.
The value is copied from the Job Line Type field in the related purchase order line.

fields.name: Job Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price of the item that is purchased for the job that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Total Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price of the items that are purchased for the job that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line amount for the job that was posted from the purchase order that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the discount that is applied to the purchase order that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is applied to items in the purchase order that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price (LCY) of the item that is purchased for the job that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Total Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price (LCY) of the items that are purchased for the job that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line amount (LCY) for the job that was posted from the purchase order that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Line Disc. Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the discount (LCY) that is applied to the purchase order that is associated with the purchase receipt line.

fields.name: Job Currency Factor
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Specifies the current exchange rate between the job currency and the local currency.

Additional Information

When the currency factor changes, the Unit Cost, Unit Cost (LCY), Unit Price, and Unit Price (LCY) fields are updated.

fields.name: Job Currency Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the currency code of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase order line.
The code is copied from the Job Currency Code field on the purchase order line.
You cannot change the job currency code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the item that was received.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity expressed in base units of measure, posted from the line.
The program copies the quantity from the Quantity field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the quantity because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the quantity on the line has been invoiced. The quantity in this field is expressed in base units of measure.
The program automatically updates the field, both when you post an invoice or an order, and when you invoice an order line that is associated with already posted receipts.

fields.name: FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting date of the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the date from the FA Posting Date field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the date because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: FA Posting Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting type of the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the type from the FA Posting Type field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the FA posting type because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the depreciation book code on the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the code from the Depreciation Book Code field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Salvage Value
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the salvage value on the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the amount from the Salvage Value field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the salvage value because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. until FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether depreciation was calculated until the FA posting date of the line. If the field contains a Yes or a check mark, depreciation was posted for the asset for the period from the FA posting date of the previous FA ledger entry to the FA posting date of this purchase line.
The program copies the field from the Depr. until FA Posting Date field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. Acquisition Cost
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether, when this line was posted, the additional acquisition cost posted on the line was depreciated in proportion to the amount by which the fixed asset had already been depreciated.
The program copies the field from the Depr. Acquisition Cost field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Maintenance Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the maintenance code on the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the code from the Maintenance Code field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Insurance No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the insurance number on the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the number from the Insurance No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the number because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Budgeted FA No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the budgeted FA number on the purchase receipt line.
The program copies the number from the Budgeted FA No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the number because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Duplicate in Depreciation Book
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a depreciation book code if the journal line was posted to a depreciation book in addition to the one in the Depreciation Book Code field.
The program copies the code from the Duplicate in Depreciation Book field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Use Duplication List
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the purchase line was posted to all depreciation books that have a check mark in the Part of Duplication List field in the Depreciation Book table.
The program copies the contents of the field from the Use Duplication List field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the vendor on this purchase document.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the item category code for the item.
You can use item categories to group default item setup values to make creating new items easier. An item category code specifies the following values:

Default general product posting group.


Default inventory posting group.


Default VAT product posting group.


Default costing method.


To see or select item categories in the Item Category window, click the drop-down arrow in the field.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this item is a catalog item.

fields.name: Purchasing Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purchasing code associated with the receipt line.

fields.name: Special Order Sales No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the special order sales order that created this purchase order.

fields.name: Special Order Sales Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number in the special order sales order that created this purchase order.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Requested Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you want the vendor to deliver to the ship-to address. The value in the field is used to calculate the latest date you can order the items to have them delivered on the requested receipt date. If you do not need delivery on a specific date, you can leave the field blank.

fields.name: Promised Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the vendor has promised to deliver the order.

fields.name: Lead Time Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the amount of time it takes to replenish the item.

fields.name: Inbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time it takes to make items part of available inventory, after the items have been posted as received.

fields.name: Planned Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the item is planned to arrive in inventory. Forward calculation: planned receipt date = order date + vendor lead time (per the vendor calendar and rounded to the next working day in first the vendor calendar and then the location calendar). If no vendor calendar exists, then: planned receipt date = order date + vendor lead time (per the location calendar). Backward calculation: order date = planned receipt date - vendor lead time (per the vendor calendar and rounded to the previous working day in first the vendor calendar and then the location calendar). If no vendor calendar exists, then: order date = planned receipt date - vendor lead time (per the location calendar).

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related order was created.

fields.name: Vendor Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's order number.

fields.name: Vendor Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's shipment number. It is inserted in the corresponding field on the source document during posting.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's reference.

fields.name: Item Charge Base Amount
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Suggests item charge assignments.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry as a corrective entry. You can use the field if you need to post a corrective entry to an account.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the overhead rate of this item.
An overhead rate is a fixed amount of indirect cost assigned per quantity (base) of the item.
